value_chain_position: Supply chain logistics network platform layer — operates a cloud-based multi-carrier transportation management and customs compliance network connecting shippers, carriers, and customs agencies on a transaction-toll model.
relative_comps: Descartes is a highly sticky B2B logistics network operator with 13% YoY growth and 37% FCF margin, compounding through M&A of specialized compliance and routing networks. Its competitive moat is the multi-directional network effect (each new carrier/customs node makes the platform more valuable to all participants). It competes with E2open on the TMS side and project44 on visibility; the fintech_rails tag is apt since every shipment triggers a compliance and data toll. Capital-light model with negative net debt.
